commit.subject: LU-19992 connect: reserve OBD_CONNECT2_FLR_EC_WR flag
commit.message:
LU-19992 connect: reserve OBD_CONNECT2_FLR_EC_WR flag

Reserve OBD_CONNECT2_FLR_EC_WR at 0x80000000000ULL
for immediate write erasure coding support.

This follows OBD_CONNECT2_FLR_EC (read-only EC)
and OBD_CONNECT2_FLR_IMMED_MIRROR (immediate write
mirroring). No functional changes -- flag reservation
only. Generated with Claude Code + Tools.

Test-Parameters: trivial
Signed-off-by: Patrick Farrell <pfarrell@whamcloud.com>
Change-Id: I5115be0a4010ba7f10d0ae813e1cdd8045417462
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/c/fs/lustre-release/+/64590
Tested-by: jenkins <devops@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@thelustrecollective.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: Marc Vef <mvef@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <maloo@whamcloud.com>
